backend/main.mo: Main ICP actor implementing user profiles, a credit system, image/video generation via HTTP outcalls, a personal gallery, Stripe payment integration, and admin controls with role-based access control.
feature_evidence.json: Feature evidence report mapping implemented features (auth, gallery, admin panel, Stripe payments, generation page) to their corresponding frontend files, components, and test IDs.
frontend-file-summaries.txt: JSON document containing one-sentence summaries of every frontend source file, serving as a quick reference for the purpose of each component, page, hook, and config file.
frontend/index.css: Global CSS defining OKLCH-based design tokens for light and dark themes (backgrounds, foregrounds, borders, charts, sidebar) via Tailwind's @layer base.
frontend/index.html: HTML entry point titled 'AI Media Studio' with a root div, Google Fonts preconnect links, and a module script loading the React app.
frontend/src/App.tsx: Root React component that wraps the app in a forced dark ThemeProvider, sets up TanStack Router, and renders a styled Sonner Toaster.
frontend/src/components/AccessDeniedScre: Full-page access denied UI shown to non-admin users, featuring a destructive icon, explanatory message, and a back-to-home button.
frontend/src/components/GalleryCard.tsx: Gallery card component that renders an image or video preview with hover effects, a type badge, item index, truncated URL, and an external link overlay.
frontend/src/components/GenerationTab.ts: React component that renders a prompt input and generate button for creating AI images or videos, managing generation state (idle/processing/complete/error) and displaying the result URL.
frontend/src/components/Layout.tsx: Main app layout component providing a sticky header with navigation links, login/logout controls, credit display, and a profile setup modal trigger, wrapping page content via an Outlet.
frontend/src/components/ProfileSetupModa: Modal dialog that prompts newly authenticated users to enter a display name and saves their profile via the useSaveCallerUserProfile mutation.
frontend/src/components/ProtectedRoute.t: Route guard component that shows a loading spinner while initializing and renders a login prompt if the user is unauthenticated, otherwise renders its children.
frontend/src/components/StripeConfigSetu: Admin component for configuring Stripe payments by entering a secret key and managing allowed countries, showing a success badge if Stripe is already configured.
frontend/src/hooks/useActor.ts: Custom hook that creates and caches an authenticated or anonymous ICP backend actor using React Query, invalidating dependent queries whenever the actor changes.
frontend/src/hooks/useInternetIdentity.t: Provides an InternetIdentityProvider and useInternetIdentity hook that manage AuthClient lifecycle, login/logout flows, and expose the current identity and login status via React context.
frontend/src/hooks/useQueries.ts: Defines React Query hooks for all backend interactions including user profile, credits, image/video generation, gallery, admin operations, and Stripe checkout sessions.
frontend/src/index.css: Global stylesheet that imports fonts, configures Tailwind, and defines OKLCH-based CSS custom properties for a dark-first design system with glass, glow, and gradient utility classes.
frontend/src/main.tsx: Application entry point that mounts the React app with QueryClientProvider and InternetIdentityProvider wrappers.
frontend/src/pages/AdminPage.tsx: Admin-only page that displays user stats, a user credits management table, and a Stripe configuration setup panel, with access denied handling for non-admins.
frontend/src/pages/CreditsPage.tsx: Protected page showing the user's current credit balance and three purchasable credit bundles that initiate a Stripe checkout session on selection.
frontend/src/pages/GalleryPage.tsx: Protected page that fetches and displays the user's AI-generated media in a responsive grid, with loading skeletons and an empty state prompting generation.
frontend/src/pages/GeneratePage.tsx: Protected page for AI media generation that displays credit balance, a low-credits warning, and tabbed UI for image and video generation using the GenerationTab component.
frontend/src/pages/IndexPage.tsx: Landing page showcasing app features (image/video generation, security, credits) with a hero banner and CTA buttons that route authenticated users to generate or unauthenticated users to log in.
frontend/src/pages/PaymentFailurePage.ts: Displays a payment failure message with options to retry by navigating to the credits page or return to the home page.
frontend/src/pages/PaymentSuccessPage.ts: Displays a payment success confirmation, invalidates the credits query to refresh the balance, and provides navigation to start generating or view credit balance.
frontend/src/routeTree.ts: Defines the TanStack Router route tree, mapping URL paths (/, /generate, /gallery, /admin, /credits, /payment-success, /payment-failure) to their respective page components under a shared Layout root.
frontend/src/utils/urlParams.ts: Utility module providing functions to read URL query parameters (including from hash-based routes), persist them to sessionStorage, and clean sensitive parameters from the URL hash.
frontend/tailwind.config.js: Tailwind CSS configuration extending the theme with custom OKLCH color tokens (cyan, emerald, amber, surface), custom fonts, border radii, box shadows, and enabling dark mode, typography, container queries, and animation plugins.
project_state.json: Tracks the overall project state, version, architectural notes, known issues, and a list of existing implemented features for a full-stack AI media generation app on the Internet Computer with Replicate API, Stripe payments, and Internet Identity login.
